summary: 12 findings across all packages. 2 critical bugs (AutoSTTEngine missing await, processing state not wired to UI), 4 high-priority issues (worker race condition, language casting, production COOP/COEP, model cache async). Implementation architecture is sound but integration layer has gaps.

findings.description: AutoSTTEngine.start() calls engine.isAvailable() without await (line 74). Returns a Promise which is truthy, so first engine is always selected regardless of actual availability.
findings.resolution: Make start() async or use a synchronous availability cache. The start() method should await isAvailable() before selecting an engine.

findings.description: Processing state from OnDeviceSTTEngine never reaches the UI. ChatInput.tsx has a type hack adding isProcessing? to useVoiceInput return, but the hook never sets this property. VoiceInputButton.isProcessing is always undefined.
findings.resolution: The useVoiceInput hook needs to be updated to support STTEngine state, or a separate hook/context needs to propagate engine state to the UI layer.

findings.description: Worker initWorker() registers two message listeners simultaneously — a one-time handler for 'ready' AND a persistent handleWorkerMessage handler. Both fire on the same message events, causing potential duplicate handling.
findings.resolution: Register the persistent handler only after the 'ready' promise resolves, not alongside it.

findings.description: Language type cast `language as 'en'` in whisper-worker.ts is incorrect. English-only models (tiny.en, base.en) only support 'en' — passing other BCP-47 tags will produce incorrect results silently.
findings.resolution: Validate language in the worker: if model ends with '.en', force language to 'en'. Log a warning if a non-English language was requested with an English-only model.

findings.description: Production deployments need Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy and Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy headers for SharedArrayBuffer. Only dev server config is set in vite.config.ts.
findings.resolution: Document production header requirements. For Railway: add headers in Dockerfile CMD or nginx config. Non-blocking for development but blocks production use.

findings.description: VoiceConfigurator's OnDeviceSttSection uses local state for selectedSize but never reads/writes the stt_model_size backend setting. User preference is not persisted.
findings.resolution: Wire selectedSize to useVoiceSettings().stt_model_size for read and useUpdateVoice('stt_model_size') for write.

findings.description: engine_preference_order validation accepts duplicates ('cloud,cloud,browser') and empty segments ('cloud,,browser'). Not a new issue but affects on-device engine selection.
findings.resolution: Add dedup and empty-filter to validation. Low priority — pre-existing issue.

findings.description: No timeout on worker initialization or transcription. If WASM loading hangs, the UI will appear frozen indefinitely.
findings.resolution: Add a 30s timeout to initWorker() and a 60s timeout to transcription. Emit error on timeout.

findings.description: Confidence score is always undefined. @remotion/whisper-web returns per-token probability (p field) that could be averaged.
findings.resolution: Compute average token probability from result.transcription[].tokens[].p if available.

findings.description: audioBuffer.getChannelData(0) can throw if audio has no channels. Rare edge case.
findings.resolution: Add a guard: if (audioBuffer.numberOfChannels === 0) throw new Error('No audio channels')

findings.description: on-device-stt-engine.ts:103 reuses 'starting' state for processing, but the STTEngineState type has no 'processing' value. This makes the processing indicator ambiguous.
findings.resolution: Consider adding a 'processing' state to STTEngineState, or use a separate flag.

findings.description: deleteModelFromCache name inconsistency — all other functions use short names (downloadModel, isModelCached) but delete uses full 'FromCache' suffix.
findings.resolution: Rename to deleteModel for consistency, or keep as-is to avoid shadowing @remotion/whisper-web's deleteModel.
